items.front: Charted holding pattern: what to issue
items.back: Only the charted holding direction and 'as published.' Issue complete instructions if pilot requests.
At least 5 minutes before aircraft estimated to reach clearance limit. If less than 5 minutes, issue immediately.
When accurate delay estimate and reason cannot immediately be determined.
State total additional en route delay; omit specific fixes.

items.front: Clearance beyond fix: when to issue (no delay)
items.back: As soon as possible, at least 5 minutes before fix when possible.

items.front: 'VIA LAST ROUTING CLEARED': when to use
items.back: Only when the most recently issued routing is valid and verbiage will be reduced.

items.front: Clearance beyond fix: three required items
items.back: 1) Clearance limit or approach clearance. 2) Route of flight. 3) Assigned altitude if different from present.

items.front: Arrival delay threshold for mandatory info issuance
En route 30+ min delays: who issues
items.back: First center controller to communicate with the aircraft, as soon as possible after entering the center's area.
First terminal controller to communicate with the aircraft (approach control for tower en route).
When total delay info is available to pilots via ATIS, unless pilot requests it.
Direction from fix, holding fix, radial/course/route, leg length (miles for DME/RNAV, min if requested), left turns only if applicable.

items.front: Holding leg length default unit with DME/RNAV
items.back: Miles. Use minutes if pilot requests or you consider necessary.

items.front: When to specify left turns in holding
items.back: Only if left turns are to be made, pilot requests, or you consider necessary.

items.front: Max holding airspeed advisory: when required
items.back: 1) Approved to exceed max speed. 2) Deviating from holding airspace. 3) Airspeed-restricted pattern with unpublished icon.
Ceiling less than 800 feet OR visibility less than 2 miles.
Do not hold below 5,000 ft AGL inbound toward airport on or within 1 SM of the localizer between OM and airport.
